name: Only My Doom May Claim Me

feat.name: Only My Doom May Claim Me
feat.text: The power of your legend, fueled by your legendary deeds, resists any weapon that is not tied to your curse. You gain resistance equal to half your level against weapon and unarmed attacks that deal a damage type other than the type chosen for your cursed weakness.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
